issue.name: Apache path traversal
issue.issueDetail: Version 2.4.49 vulnerable to CVE-2021-41773 — no authentication required

issue.name: Public S3 bucket
issue.issueDetail: Bucket ACL public-write confirmed. Bucket policy grants sts:AssumeRole to arn:aws:iam::123456789:role/AdminRole. Exposed AWS access key found in bucket listing. DATABASE_URL=postgres://db.example.com:5432/prod found in exposed .env file in bucket.
